title: 60cm Large Terracotta Indoor/Outdoor Planting Trough | Lightweight Plastic Flower, Veg & Herb Planter for Windowsill Herb gardens, Patio & Balcony | Weather-Resistant Plant Pot
features: {SPACIOUS PLANTING TROUGH} Ideal for your green thumb, the Cheerful Bargains 60cm Large Terracotta Indoor/Outdoor Planting Trough offers ample space for flowers, vegetables, and herbs, perfect for creating a lush windowsill garden or a vibrant balcony/patio display.
{DURABLE RIPPLED WALLS} Featuring rippled walls, this planter not only adds an aesthetic touch but also ensures extra durability, making it a robust choice for both indoor and outdoor gardening.

{LIGHTWEIGHT AND VERSATILE} Constructed from lightweight plastic, this planter is easy to move and suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, allowing you to bring nature's beauty to any corner of your home or garden.

{WEATHER-RESISTANT DURABILITY} Designed to withstand the elements, this terracotta-style planting trough is resistant to weather-related damage, ensuring a long-lasting home for your plants in all seasons.
{STYLISH TERRACOTTA FINISH} The classic terracotta finish adds a touch of elegance and warmth to your home or garden decor, blending seamlessly with a variety of styles and settings.
description: Cheerful Bargains 60cm Large Terracotta Planting Trough Introducing the Cheerful Bargains Large Planting Trough, ideal for both indoor and outdoor gardening. With a length of 60cm, this terracotta planter is perfect for beautifying patios, and balconies, or creating windowsill herb gardens. Made from lightweight, sturdy plastic, it's easy to move, suiting varied gardening needs. The terracotta colour adds classic elegance, fitting various decor styles. Weather-resistant, it's durable against different conditions. The solid base, without drainage holes, offers flexibility. If needed, holes can be drilled for drainage, making it adaptable to your gardening requirements. The trough's rippled walls are not merely decorative; they provide enhanced strength, ensuring this planter remains a durable component of your garden. Whether planting ornamental flowers, vegetables, or herbs, this trough provides ample space and the reliability you need for successful gardening. Key Features: 60cm planter, ideal for diverse plants Weather-resistant, suitable for all seasons Lightweight, easy to handle Optional drainage customisation Rippled walls for added durability Classic terracotta colour, enhancing any setting Specification: Material: Durable Lightweight Plastic Colour: Terracotta Dimensions: Length: 60cm/23.62", Width: 19cm/7.48", Height: 16cm/6.30" Drainage: Customisable Solid Base Weather-Resistant: Yes Includes: 1x Terracotta Planting Trough Enhance your gardening with the Cheerful Bargains Large Terracotta Planting Trough, a versatile and stylish choice for any green space or window display.
